message:
feat(tui): add ANSI-to-ftui converter, theme-aware toasts, and console log ring buffer

Enhance the TUI dashboard with proper ANSI rendering, themeable toast
notifications, and a toggleable console log panel:

Console ANSI converter (console.rs):
- Add full ANSI-to-ftui text converter supporting SGR attributes (bold, dim,
  italic, underline, strikethrough, reverse) and standard/bright/256/24-bit
  fg/bg colors
- Fix icon width calculation using display_width() instead of hardcoded 3
- Fix visible length calculation using strip_ansi_len() for result lines

Theme-aware toasts (tui_app.rs):
- Replace hardcoded TOAST_COLOR_* constants with theme-aware functions
  reading from TuiThemePalette::current()
- Add toast_error/warning/info/success/focus color fields to TuiThemePalette

Console log ring buffer (tui_bridge.rs):
- Add 2000-entry console_log VecDeque with atomic sequence counter to
  TuiSharedState for structured log ingestion

Dashboard log panel (dashboard.rs):
- Add toggleable console log panel (L key) with sidebar layout
- Ingest entries from TuiSharedState on each tick via console_log_since()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -136,6 +136,13 @@ pub struct TuiThemePalette {

+    pub toast_info: PackedRgba,

+

     pub json_key: PackedRgba,
     pub json_string: PackedRgba,

+            toast_success: PackedRgba::rgb(100, 220, 170),
+            toast_focus: PackedRgba::rgb(80, 220, 255),
+
             json_key: accent,
             json_string: PackedRgba::rgb(80, 220, 100),
             json_number: PackedRgba::rgb(255, 184, 108),
@@ -374,6 +387,12 @@ impl TuiThemePalette {
